notes: Four theorems filling gaps in Mathlib's HahnSeries API (orderTop and leadingCoeff for inv/div), explicitly flagged as upstream candidates in the module docstring. All proofs are short (≤19 lines) and axiom-clean. The 'unused' entries (orderTop_div, leadingCoeff_div) are used extensively by BridgeMulByInt.lean and SilvermanIV14.lean but have no callers within this file itself.
